12-25.text: Merry Christmas. I hope today feels warm, peaceful, and full of little moments that make you smile.

03-20.text: I hope today reminds you how loved, celebrated, and appreciated you are. Thank you for being exactly who you are—you make my life brighter every single day.

07-31.text: Every day with you is my favorite part of life. Thank you for choosing us, and for making ordinary days feel extraordinary. I love you.
